failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: hNZRyX
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 204, 401, 404, 409, 500
[400] Bad Request:
`{"message":"Internal server error","request_id":"e5dc8026-c20c-4439-b7ad-e3e3c6da986d"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Cookie: [Filtered]' http://localhost:8000/v2/overlays/e3e70682-c209-4cac-629f-6fbed82c07cd/transactions/0/include
